title: Syzygium brousmichei
taxonomy: Syzygium brousmichei is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae, native to Madagascar. It is a member of the genus Syzygium, which includes over 1,000 species of trees and shrubs. The genus Syzygium is part of the larger family Myrtaceae, which comprises around 6,000 species of flowering plants. Myrtaceae is a family of angiosperms, or flowering plants, that are commonly known as the myrtle family. The classification of Syzygium brousmichei reflects its evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.
